title: Page
description: A Page is a discrete screen representing a product Resource. It contains one or more Blocks and maps from a Resource.

name.description: The PascalCase name of the page.

description.description: A human-readable explanation of what this page shows.

blocks.description: The named Blocks that make up this page, in order.

examples.name: LoanDetail
examples.description: Displays the full details of a single loan.
